content: agent2 starting: implementing Global Filter Registry (register_filter/unregister_filter) in outlines/prompts.py. Will touch outlines/prompts.py only.

Merged your create_jinja_env/filters change with my global registry (register_filter/unregister_filter). Precedence: global registry < built-ins < your per-call filters=. __call__ now refreshes env.filters from _FILTER_REGISTRY each render so register/unregister take effect even on already-created Prompts. Pushed to team/agent2. All test_prompts.py tests pass.
